concept: Command Center Navy/Gold - Military intelligence meets Ivy League institutional gravitas. High security, tactical precision, premium academic trust.

headings.usage: H1, H2 headers for institutional gravitas (Vault, Trust Dashboard)

technical.usage: MFA codes, encryption status, time-stamps, legal footer, labels

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden bg-[#020617]
spacing_and_layout.borderRadius: rounded-sm (sharp, tactical feel, avoid excessive curves)
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment, left-aligned data fields, centered CTAs for impact

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A1128] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-sm px-6 py-4 hover:bg-[#FDE047] transition-all shadow-lg shadow-[#D4AF37]/20
buttons.secondary: border border-[#D4AF37]/50 text-[#D4AF37] font-medium uppercase tracking-widest rounded-sm px-6 py-4 hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 transition-all
buttons.danger: border border-red-500/50 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded-sm px-6 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest font-mono text-sm

cards.tactical: bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-slate-700/50 p-6 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-slate-950 border border-slate-700 text-white rounded-sm px-4 py-3 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:border-[#D4AF37] font-mono text-sm

badges.verified: bg-[#D4AF37]/10 border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1 rounded-sm

motion_and_interactions.mfa_scanning: Framer motion infinite scanning line over military grid (Terminal overlay)
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp 1px border highlights or text color shifts, no bouncy spring animations

icons.style: duotone for headers/empty states, regular/thin for technical UI

images.description: Gold seal/medallion for Trust Dashboard and Verified Student badges
Dark tactical grid background for the MFA processing state and Security Dashboard
Background texture for the Document Viewer / Secure Vault items
Dark moody university courtyard. Use as a heavily darkened/blurred background overlay for the Onboarding/Welcome screen.

page_specific_instructions.header: Sticky nav. Must feature EN/ES language toggle front and center. High contrast.
page_specific_instructions.onboarding: Use 'university_night_bg' with a heavy dark overlay (bg-[#020617]/85). Place 'secure_gold_seal' prominent. ID.me CTA must be massive, authoritative.
page_specific_instructions.dashboard: Bento grid using 'tactical' cards. Vault summary at top. Highlight 1-Tap Share.
page_specific_instructions.ai_browser_agent: Terminal-like UI. Enter credentials -> MFA wait screen. Use 'tactical_navy_bg' with monospace fonts. Show step-by-step progress with status dots.
page_specific_instructions.document_viewer: Display PDF/Document using 'academic_watermark_bg' texture. Overlay a 'Verified Student' watermark using the gold seal motif. Include self-destruct share CTA.
page_specific_instructions.security_trust_dashboard: Heavy monospace usage. Show encryption status (AES-256), recent activity logs, ID.me verified status. Feels like a military intelligence terminal.
page_specific_instructions.footer: Must state 'A Division of Brick Outdoor Living, Inc.' in small monospace uppercase font at the bottom of the main wrapper.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' (e.g., data-testid='id-me-login-btn', data-testid='lang-toggle-en')
